infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Safe-Sawar needs your location to find nearby rides and match you with other women in your area.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Safe-Sawar needs your location for ride tracking and emergency SOS.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Safe-Sawar needs camera access for biometric verification.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Safe-Sawar uses Face ID for secure biometric verification.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Safe-Sawar uses Bluetooth for mesh network emergency SOS when internet is unavailable.
